description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test - python client that runs on pull requests to specific branches and paths, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: build_server and test. The build_server job builds a server in an ubuntu-latest environment with a custom container image, and the test job runs Python client tests in a separate ubuntu-latest environment, depending on the build_server job. The test job sets up Python 3.11, installs thrift-compiler 0.13.0 manually, downloads an artifact, starts a Pegasus cluster, and runs Python client tests.
